hero.paragraph: VitaChain connects farmers and restaurateurs through a short, traceable chain: IoT monitoring, a logistics marketplace and surplus redistribution — all on a single platform.

heading.title: A complete agri-food chain
heading.subtitle: Each module works standalone — together, they cover the whole journey, from the field to the plate.

katara.desc: Your ESP32 sensors report humidity, pH and conductivity for every plot. Set your own thresholds and get an on-demand agronomic diagnosis.

farmarket.desc: Restaurateurs order directly from producers. VitaChain orchestrates logistics and order tracking, from the field to the counter.

botaba9a.desc: Track temperature from transport to storage: a fully traceable cold chain that keeps products fresh and safe.

secondserve.desc: Unsold stock and surplus become discounted offers for partners: less waste, more value returned to the industry.

heading.title: Four steps, one virtuous cycle
heading.subtitle: VitaChain shortens the chain and keeps every link connected to the next.

cultivate.title: Grow & measure
cultivate.desc: Katara monitors the soil continuously and alerts you as soon as a threshold is crossed.

sell.title: Sell directly
sell.desc: List your harvest on FarMarket; restaurateurs order in just a few clicks.

deliver.title: Deliver & track
deliver.desc: Logistics are orchestrated and tracked until the order is received.

valorize.title: Valorize the surplus
valorize.desc: Unsold stock finds a second life through SecondServe instead of being thrown away.

heading.title: Less waste, more value
heading.subtitle: A better-connected supply chain loses less — in the field and in the kitchen.

finalCta.title: Join the VitaChain network
finalCta.paragraph: Farmer or restaurateur, create your account and take back control of your supply chain — from crop monitoring to fighting waste.

footer.description: The anti-waste agri-food ecosystem — from the field to the dashboard, from producer to restaurateur.
